trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Conflicting signals across momentum (bearish MACD/EMAs vs 1d channel up), volume (weak selling but price falling), and open interest/funding rate dynamics make a clear directional bias difficult.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price holds $249.65 support, with a 1h candle close above $250.00, confirming a bounce from the low range.
trade_plans.invalidation: Price closes below $248.00 on a 1h timeframe.
confluence_signals: Price falling with LOW volume (weak selling pressure, bullish divergence)
MACD 1h bearish but contracting (fading bearish momentum)
Fear & Greed Index: Extreme Fear (contrarian buy signal)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Five aligned contrarian bullish signals suggest a significant bounce potential from extreme oversold conditions, despite the prevailing downtrend. The weak selling volume further supports a reversal.
